import openai


def summarize_documents(docs: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    client = openai.OpenAI()
    batch_messages = [
        {"role": "user", "content": f"Summarize: {doc}"} for doc in docs
    ]
    responses = []
    for batch_start in range(0, len(batch_messages), 20):
        batch = batch_messages[batch_start : batch_start + 20]
        response = client.chat.completions.create(
            model="gpt-4",
            messages=batch,
        )
        responses.extend(response.choices)
    return [choice.message.content for choice in responses]


def classify_reviews(reviews: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    client = openai.OpenAI()
    batch = [
        {"role": "user", "content": f"Classify: {review}"}
        for review in reviews
    ]
    response = client.chat.completions.create(
        model="gpt-3.5-turbo",
        messages=batch,
    )
    return [choice.message.content for choice in response.choices]


def translate_batch(texts: list[str], target_lang: str) -> list[str]:
    client = openai.OpenAI()
    prompts = [
        [
            {"role": "system", "content": f"Translate to {target_lang}"},
            {"role": "user", "content": text},
        ]
        for text in texts
    ]
    results = []
    for chunk_start in range(0, len(prompts), 10):
        chunk = prompts[chunk_start : chunk_start + 10]
        response = client.chat.completions.create(model="gpt-4", messages=chunk)
        results.extend(c.message.content for c in response.choices)
    return results
